body.title: [sprint] Consequence check: nightly chat classifier
body.intention: I intend to verify nightly classifier deposits are enriching the memory graph without noise flooding.
body.description:
**What changed:** Nightly classifier now ingests CC chat transcripts and deposits classified nodes.
**Predicted unintended effects:** (1) Low-confidence classifications deposit noise into the palace — check confidence threshold gate. (2) Duplicate nodes from repeated transcripts — check dedup logic. (3) Classifier cost spike if LLM variant runs on all turns without cache hits.
**Signals to watch:** Palace node count growth rate; classification confidence distribution in logs; cloud_calls_count in competition.classifications_cache; Nanny cron log for errors.
**Gate condition:** Check by 2026-06-26 or 7 days after first successful nightly run.

**Affected files:** None — observation only
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Observe predicted effects; annotate as occurred/clear/partial and close
**Completion criteria:** Annotated with outcome and closed.
